mapper.sql: select m.id, m.permission_id, m.real_time_location, m.longitude, m.latitude, m.current_height, m.speed, m.warning_flag, m.flight_time, m.is_violation, m.create_by, m.create_time, a.application_no from flight_monitor m left join flight_permission p on m.permission_id = p.id left join flight_application a on p.application_id = a.id
mapper.insert: insert into flight_monitor (permission_id, real_time_location, longitude, latitude, current_height, speed, warning_flag, flight_time, is_violation, create_by, create_time) values (#{permissionId}, #{realTimeLocation}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{currentHeight}, #{speed}, #{warningFlag}, #{flightTime}, #{isViolation}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from flight_monitor where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select p.id as permissionId, a.application_no as applicationNo, p.approved_area as approvedArea, p.approved_height as approvedHeight, m.real_time_location as realTimeLocation, m.current_height as currentHeight, m.warning_flag as warningFlag, p.approved_start_time as approvedStartTime, p.approved_end_time as approvedEndTime from flight_permission p join flight_application a on p.application_id = a.id join flight_monitor m on m.permission_id = p.id where p.permission_status = '0' and now() between p.approved_start_time and p.approved_end_time and m.id = (select max(m2.id) from flight_monitor m2 where m2.permission_id = p.id) order by p.id

select real_time_location as realTimeLocation, current_height as currentHeight, warning_flag as warningFlag, create_time as createTime from flight_monitor where permission_id = #{permissionId} order by create_time

select p.id as permissionId, d.drone_name as droneName, p.approved_area as flightArea, p.permission_status as permissionStatus, p.approved_start_time as approvedStartTime, p.approved_end_time as approvedEndTime, a.application_no as applicationNo from flight_permission p join flight_application a on p.application_id = a.id join drone_info d on a.drone_id = d.id
AND a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} AND ((p.permission_status = '0' and now() between p.approved_start_time and p.approved_end_time) or exists (select 1 from flight_monitor m where m.permission_id = p.id))
order by p.id desc

select longitude, latitude, speed, flight_time as flightTime, is_violation as isViolation from flight_monitor where permission_id = #{permissionId} and longitude is not null and latitude is not null order by coalesce(flight_time, create_time) asc, create_time asc, id asc
